name: code-agent-eval
description: TypeScript library for evaluating prompts against coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, etc.) with multi-iteration testing and scoring
author: Pedro Figueiredo

scripts.build: npm run typecheck && tsdown && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p='dist/cli.js',c=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8');if(!c.startsWith('#!'))fs.writeFileSync(p,'#!/usr/bin/env node\n'+c);fs.chmodSync(p,0o755)"
scripts.release:reminder: node -e "console.error('\n*** Before releasing: run the /prepare-release Agent command (changelog, README, typecheck, test, build). ***\n')"
scripts.release:alpha: npm run build && bumpp --preid alpha --prerelease && npm publish --tag latest
